sentences.sentence: It is not easy to be systematic and objective about language study.
sentences.translation: 对语言研究做到系统而客观并不容易。

structure.text: It is not easy
to be systematic and objective about language study

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 to be...。
systematic 和 objective 是并列表语。

sentences.sentence: Popular linguistic debate regularly deteriorates into invective and polemic.
sentences.translation: 大众语言争论经常恶化为谩骂和论战。

structure.text: Popular linguistic debate
regularly deteriorates into invective and polemic

difficult_points: deteriorate into 表示恶化成某种状态。
invective 和 polemic 是并列结果。

sentences.sentence: Language belongs to everyone, so most people feel they have a right to hold an opinion about it.
sentences.translation: 语言属于每个人，因此大多数人都觉得自己有权发表看法。

structure.text: Language belongs to everyone
so most people feel they have a right to hold an opinion about it
they have a right to hold an opinion about it

difficult_points: so 连接因果结果；feel 后嵌套宾语从句。
have a right to do 表示有权做某事。

sentences.sentence: And when opinions differ, emotions can run high.
sentences.translation: 当意见不同时，情绪可能会变得激烈。

structure.text: when opinions differ
emotions can run high

difficult_points: when 引导时间或条件从句。
run high 表示情绪高涨或激烈。

sentences.sentence: Arguments can start as easily over minor points of usage as over major policies of linguistic education.
sentences.translation: 人们既可能因细小用法问题轻易争论，也可能因语言教育的重大政策争论。

structure.text: Arguments can start as easily over minor points of usage as over major policies of linguistic education
as easily over minor points of usage as over major policies of linguistic education

difficult_points: as...as... 比较结构表示两类问题都同样容易引发争论。
over 在此表示争论的原因。

sentences.sentence: Language, moreover, is a very public behavior, so it is easy for different usages to be noted and criticised.
sentences.translation: 此外，语言是一种非常公开的行为，因此不同用法很容易被注意和批评。

structure.text: Language, moreover, is a very public behavior
so it is easy for different usages to be noted and criticised
for different usages to be noted and criticised

difficult_points: it is easy for...to... 是形式主语结构。
to be noted and criticised 是并列被动不定式。

sentences.sentence: No part of society or social behavior is exempt.
sentences.translation: 社会或社会行为的任何部分都不能例外。

structure.text: No part of society or social behavior
is exempt

difficult_points: No part 表示没有任何部分。
exempt 作表语，表示被豁免。

sentences.sentence: Linguistic factors influence how we judge personality, intelligence, social status, educational standards, job aptitude, and many other areas of identity and social survival.
sentences.translation: 语言因素会影响我们如何判断个性、智力、社会地位、教育标准、工作能力以及身份和社会生存的许多其他方面。

structure.text: Linguistic factors
influence how we judge personality, intelligence, social status, educational standards, job aptitude, and many other areas of identity and social survival
how we judge personality, intelligence, social status, educational standards, job aptitude, and many other areas of identity and social survival

difficult_points: how 引导 influence 的宾语从句。
逗号后列举语言判断涉及的多个方面。

sentences.sentence: As a result, it is easy to hurt, and to be hurt, when language use is unfeelingly attacked.
sentences.translation: 因此，当语言用法遭到冷漠攻击时，人们很容易伤害别人，也很容易受到伤害。

structure.text: As a result
it is easy to hurt, and to be hurt
when language use is unfeelingly attacked

difficult_points: it is easy to...中两个不定式并列，分别主动和被动。
when 从句使用被动语态，说明受到攻击的条件。

sentences.sentence: In its most general sense, prescriptivism is the view that one variety of language has an inherently higher value than others, and that this ought to be imposed on the whole of the speech community.
sentences.translation: 从最宽泛的意义上说，规定主义认为一种语言变体本质上比其他变体价值更高，而且这种变体应该强加给整个言语群体。

structure.text: In its most general sense
prescriptivism is the view
that one variety of language has an inherently higher value than others
and that this ought to be imposed on the whole of the speech community

difficult_points: the view 后两个 that 从句并列说明观点。
ought to be imposed 是情态动词加被动语态。

sentences.sentence: The view is propounded especially in relation to grammar and vocabulary, and frequently with reference to pronunciation.
sentences.translation: 这种观点尤其在语法和词汇方面提出，也常常涉及发音。

structure.text: The view is propounded especially in relation to grammar and vocabulary
and frequently with reference to pronunciation

difficult_points: is propounded 是被动语态，表示观点被提出。
in relation to 和 with reference to 都表示涉及某方面。

sentences.sentence: The variety which is favoured, in this account, is usually a version of the 'standard' written language, especially as encountered in literature, or in the formal spoken language which most closely reflects this style.
sentences.translation: 按照这种观点，被偏爱的变体通常是‘标准’书面语言的一种形式，尤其是文学中遇到的形式，或最接近这种风格的正式口语。

structure.text: The variety which is favoured
which is favoured
in this account
is usually a version of the 'standard' written language
which most closely reflects this style

difficult_points: which is favoured 修饰 variety；第二个 which 修饰 formal spoken language。
as encountered in literature 是省略结构，表示在文学中遇到的形式。

sentences.sentence: Adherents to this variety are said to speak or write 'correctly'; deviations from it are said to be 'incorrect'.
sentences.translation: 这种变体的拥护者被认为说话或写作‘正确’；偏离它的用法则被认为‘不正确’。

structure.text: Adherents to this variety are said to speak or write 'correctly'
deviations from it are said to be 'incorrect'

difficult_points: are said to do 是被动报告结构。
speak or write 是并列不定式。

sentences.sentence: All the main languages have been studied prescriptively, especially in the 18th century approach to the writing of grammars and dictionaries.
sentences.translation: 所有主要语言都曾以规定主义方式研究，尤其体现在18世纪编写语法书和词典的方法中。

structure.text: All the main languages
have been studied prescriptively
especially in the 18th century approach to the writing of grammars and dictionaries

difficult_points: have been studied 是现在完成时被动。
approach to 后接名词 writing。

sentences.sentence: The aims of these early grammarians were threefold: (a) they wanted to codify the principles of their languages, to show that there was a system beneath the apparent chaos of usage; (b) they wanted a means of settling disputes over usage, and (c) they wanted to point out what they felt to be common errors, in order to 'improve' the language.
sentences.translation: 这些早期语法学家的目标有三个：(a) 编纂语言原则，显示表面混乱的用法之下存在系统；(b) 寻找解决用法争议的手段；(c) 指出他们认为的常见错误，以‘改进’语言。

structure.text: The aims of these early grammarians were threefold
they wanted to codify the principles of their languages, to show that there was a system beneath the apparent chaos of usage
they wanted a means of settling disputes over usage
they wanted to point out what they felt to be common errors, in order to 'improve' the language

difficult_points: 冒号后列出三个并列目标；to show 和 in order to 表示目的。
what they felt to be common errors 是 point out 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: The authoritarian nature of the approach is best characterised by its reliance on 'rules' of grammar.
sentences.translation: 这种方法的权威主义性质，最明显地体现在它依赖语法‘规则’。

structure.text: The authoritarian nature of the approach
is best characterised by its reliance on 'rules' of grammar

difficult_points: be characterised by 表示以……为特征。
reliance on 后接名词，说明依赖对象。

sentences.sentence: Some usages are 'prescribed', to be learnt and followed accurately; others are 'proscribed', to be avoided.
sentences.translation: 有些用法被‘规定’，需要准确学习和遵循；另一些则被‘禁止’，应当避免。

structure.text: Some usages are 'prescribed'
to be learnt and followed accurately
others are 'proscribed'
to be avoided

difficult_points: prescribed 与 proscribed 是一对相反术语。
to be learnt/followed/avoided 都是被动不定式，说明要求。

sentences.sentence: In this early period, there were no half-measures: usage was either right or wrong, and it was the task of the grammarian not simply to record alternatives, but to pronounce judgment upon them.
sentences.translation: 在早期，没有折中办法：用法非对即错，语法学家的任务不只是记录不同形式，还要对它们作出判断。

structure.text: In this early period
there were no half-measures
usage was either right or wrong
it was the task of the grammarian not simply to record alternatives, but to pronounce judgment upon them

difficult_points: either...or... 表示非此即彼。
not simply...but... 连接两个不定式任务。

sentences.sentence: These attitudes are still with us, and they motivate a widespread concern that linguistic standards should be maintained.
sentences.translation: 这些态度至今仍存在，并促成了维护语言标准的普遍关切。

structure.text: These attitudes are still with us
and they motivate a widespread concern
that linguistic standards should be maintained

difficult_points: be with us 表示仍然存在。
that 从句说明 concern 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, there is an alternative point of view that is concerned less with standards than with the facts of linguistic usage.
sentences.translation: 然而，还有另一种观点，它关注的不是标准，而是语言使用的事实。

structure.text: Nevertheless
there is an alternative point of view
that is concerned less with standards than with the facts of linguistic usage

difficult_points: there is 引出 alternative point of view。
less...than... 表示关注重点的对比。

sentences.sentence: This approach is summarised in the statement that it is the task of the grammarian to describe, not prescribe—to record the facts of linguistic diversity, and not to attempt the impossible tasks of evaluating language variation or halting language change.
sentences.translation: 这种方法可概括为一句话：语法学家的任务是描述而非规定——记录语言多样性的事实，而不是试图完成评价语言变体或阻止语言变化这些不可能的任务。

structure.text: This approach is summarised in the statement
that it is the task of the grammarian to describe, not prescribe
to record the facts of linguistic diversity, and not to attempt the impossible tasks of evaluating language variation or halting language change

difficult_points: that 从句具体说明 statement；not prescribe 与 describe 形成对比。
evaluating 和 halting 是并列动名词，作 tasks 的内容。

sentences.sentence: In the second half of the 18th century, we already find advocates of this view, such as Joseph Priestley, whose Rudiments of English Grammar (1761) insists that 'the custom of speaking is the original and only just standard of any language'.
sentences.translation: 18世纪下半叶，我们已经发现了这种观点的倡导者，例如约瑟夫·普里斯特利；他的《英语语法基础》（1761年）坚持认为‘说话习惯是任何语言最初且唯一公正的标准’。

structure.text: In the second half of the 18th century
we already find advocates of this view, such as Joseph Priestley
whose Rudiments of English Grammar (1761) insists that 'the custom of speaking is the original and only just standard of any language'

difficult_points: whose 修饰 Joseph Priestley，表示其著作。
insist that 后接宾语从句，引用内容为直接引语。

sentences.sentence: Linguistic issues, it is argued, cannot be solved by logic and legislation.
sentences.translation: 有人认为，语言问题无法通过逻辑和立法解决。

structure.text: Linguistic issues
it is argued
cannot be solved by logic and legislation

difficult_points: it is argued 是插入的被动报告语。
cannot be solved 是情态动词加被动语态。

sentences.sentence: And this view has become the tenet of the modern linguistic approach to grammatical analysis.
sentences.translation: 这种观点已经成为现代语言学语法分析方法的信条。

structure.text: this view
has become
the tenet of the modern linguistic approach to grammatical analysis

difficult_points: has become 是现在完成时，表示观点已确立。
tenet 表示信条或核心原则。

sentences.sentence: In our own time, the opposition between 'descriptivists' and 'prescriptivists' has often become extreme, with both sides painting unreal pictures of the other.
sentences.translation: 在当今，‘描述主义者’与‘规定主义者’之间的对立常常变得极端，双方都把对方描绘成不真实的样子。

structure.text: In our own time
the opposition between 'descriptivists' and 'prescriptivists' has often become extreme
with both sides painting unreal pictures of the other

difficult_points: with + 名词 + 分词构成独立结构，补充说明伴随情况。
between A and B 表示两者之间的对立。

sentences.sentence: Descriptive grammarians have been presented as people who do not care about standards, because of the way they see all forms of usage as equally valid.
sentences.translation: 描述性语法学家被描绘成不在乎标准的人，因为他们把所有用法都看作同样有效。

structure.text: Descriptive grammarians have been presented as people
who do not care about standards
because of the way they see all forms of usage as equally valid

difficult_points: have been presented as 是现在完成时被动。
see A as B 表示把A看作B。

sentences.sentence: Prescriptive grammarians have been presented as blind adherents to a historical tradition.
sentences.translation: 规定性语法学家被描绘成盲目遵循历史传统的人。

structure.text: Prescriptive grammarians
have been presented as blind adherents to a historical tradition

difficult_points: have been presented as 表示被描绘成。
adherent to 表示遵循或拥护某事物。

sentences.sentence: The opposition has even been presented in quasi-political terms—of radical liberalism vs elitist conservatism.
sentences.translation: 这种对立甚至被描述为准政治性的对立——激进自由主义对精英保守主义。

structure.text: The opposition
has even been presented in quasi-political terms
of radical liberalism vs elitist conservatism

difficult_points: has been presented 是现在完成时被动。
quasi- 表示‘准、类似但不完全是’。
